description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the Auto-DevOps template and adds a test job in the test stage. The test job runs two shell commands: first, it uses wget to download the latest ShellCheck tarball from GitHub and extracts it with tar; second, it runs the extracted shellcheck binary (shellcheck-latest/shellcheck) with exclusions -eSC2039 -eSC1071 -eSC2086 on the first script file under /builds/internetarchive/kre8/ that contains a shebang line, ignoring files named aliases or ending with .yaml. No additional image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
